name: Coway Airmega 450
context: For most people in a typical home. Handles rooms up to ~360 sq ft with two air changes per hour, runs quietly on low, and has a pollution sensor that adjusts fan speed automatically. Panel lock is handy if you have kids.
reason: Top pick across multiple sources for general-purpose air purification.

name: Levoit Core Mini-P
context: For a bedroom, office, or dorm room where you want cleaner air without spending much. Compact and energy-efficient — runs for pennies a day. Won't handle a living room, but does a solid job in small spaces.
reason: Best budget option under $150 with strong small-room performance.
recommendations: Best Value Air Purifier for Small Spaces

name: AirDoctor Smart 5500i
context: For a large open-concept space or anyone who wants set-it-and-forget-it air quality monitoring. Built-in AQI sensor, auto mode, and app control. Quieter than most purifiers at this capacity.
reason: Premium upgrade with smart features and large room coverage.

name: Airpura R600 All-Purpose Air Purifier
context: For anyone who wants to buy Canadian-made. Airpura designs and manufactures every unit at their facility in Laval, Quebec. The R600 is their flagship all-purpose model — no-frills, all-metal construction built to last. Popular with allergy clinics and people with chemical sensitivities.
reason: Canadian-designed and manufactured in Laval, Quebec. Tier A — made in Canada.
positives: Designed and manufactured in Laval, Quebec
18 lb activated carbon filter — exceptional gas and odor removal
All-metal powder-coat steel housing, no plastic
Covers up to 2,000 sq ft at 560 CFM
No ozone, no ionizer, no unnecessary gimmicks
negatives: No smart features — no app, no AQI sensor, no auto mode
45 lbs — heavy to move between rooms
